workspace.deleteDescription: This permanently removes this saved show. This cannot be undone.

roster.heading: Roster
roster.castingHelp: On desktop, drag performers into scene slots. On mobile, assign cast using the dropdown menus in each scene.
roster.emptyDescription: Add someone above to start building your roster.
roster.roleCountHost: Host in {count, plural, one {# scene} other {# scenes}}
roster.roleCountPlayer: Player in {count, plural, one {# scene} other {# scenes}}
roster.renameDescription: Update how this person appears in the roster and scene slots.
roster.markAbsentDescription: They will stay in assigned scene slots with a warning style, but cannot be dragged into new slots until cleared.
roster.deleteDescriptionNoAssignments: They will be permanently removed from the roster.
roster.deleteDescriptionWithAssignments: Choose whether to remove their scene assignments or keep them as warning slots in the show.
roster.deleteKeepSlots: Remove from roster, keep scene slots
roster.deleteClearScenes: Remove from roster and all scenes

lineup.heading: Lineup
lineup.reorderHelp: On desktop, drag scenes to reorder. On mobile, use the up and down buttons on each scene card.
lineup.emptyDescription: Add a scene above to start building the lineup.
lineup.renameDescription: Update how this scene appears in the lineup and printout.
lineup.removeDescription: This removes the scene and all host and player assignments for it.
lineup.allPlayDescription: This removes {count, plural, one {# assigned player} other {# assigned players}} from {sceneName} and marks the scene as all play.

show.renameDescription: Set the show name for the header and printout. Leave blank to use "Untitled Show".
